node.statement: LOWER BOUND: q_r >= -C eta ||r||^2 1. Write delta=||P-Phi|| (GT-Pprops), with delta<=C eta. STEP A (r is Phi-near-fixed): since r in A=Im P, P(r)=r (node 1.1), so ||Phi(r)-r||=||Phi(r)-P(r)||=||(Phi-P)(r)||<=delta||r||. STEP B (Jordan-Schwarz): Phi unital positive on B(H)_sa, so by GT-jordan-schwarz with self-adjoint a=r, Phi(r^2) >= Phi(r)^2 (the Jordan-Schwarz inequality (Phi r)^2 <= Phi(r^2)). STEP C (perturb the square): with x:=Phi(r), ||x-r||<=delta||r|| (Step A), and ||x+r||<=||x||+||r||<=(||Phi||+1)||r||<=(2+C eta)||r|| (GT-Pprops ||P||<=1+C eta and ||Phi||<=1 from def positive-unital; here ||Phi(r)||<=||r|| since Phi is a unital positive contraction). Then Phi(r)^2-r^2=x^2-r^2=(x-r) o (x+r) (Jordan identity for commuting... rather: in V, x^2-r^2 = x o x - r o r; use ||x^2-r^2||=||(x-r) o (x+r) ... )  -- bound directly: ||Phi(r)^2-r^2|| <= ||Phi(r)-r|| ||Phi(r)+r|| <= delta||r| * (2+C eta)||r|| <= C delta||r||^2 (GT-bh-cstar submultiplicativity ||a o b||<=||a|| ||b|| and triangle). By GT-orderunit-def, ||Phi(r)^2-r^2||<=C delta||r||^2 gives Phi(r)^2 >= r^2 - C delta||r||^2 1. Combining with Step B: Phi(r^2) >= Phi(r)^2 >= r^2 - C delta||r||^2 1. STEP D (replace Phi by P): ||(P-Phi)(r^2)||<=delta||r^2||=delta||r||^2 (GT-bh-cstar ||r^2||=||r||^2), so by GT-orderunit-def P(r^2) >= Phi(r^2) - delta||r||^2 1 >= r^2 - C delta||r||^2 1. Hence q_r=P(r^2)-r^2 >= -C delta||r||^2 1 >= -C eta||r||^2 1 (delta<=C eta). Uses node 1.1.
